insights.benefitSummary: Reduces prompt-injection and unsafe output risk in agent workflows.
tradeoffs: Adds stricter prompts and validation steps
usageNotes: Pair with strict security posture
Use with risk assessment before install in CI

insights.benefitSummary: Raises CI trust by enforcing least-privilege, deterministic builds, and stronger scan gates.
tradeoffs: More strict checks can initially fail often
usageNotes: Start in warn mode for new policies, then move to blocking

insights.benefitSummary: Finds critical security gaps early with fast, repeatable threat-model templates.
tradeoffs: Needs periodic updates as architecture changes
usageNotes: Attach output to PRs for audit traceability

insights.benefitSummary: Improves release quality with structured gates for versioning, changelog, and test health.
usageNotes: Combine with CI build + test + audit checks

insights.benefitSummary: Keeps technical docs aligned with code and CLI behavior with lower manual effort.
tradeoffs: Generated docs still need human review
Can drift if not run regularly
usageNotes: Run from CI for consistent docs freshness

insights.benefitSummary: Accelerates bulk web extraction tasks for catalog enrichment and monitoring.
usageNotes: Use only where source terms allow scraping

insights.benefitSummary: Improves container build reliability, image hygiene, and local-to-CI consistency.
whenToUse: When image size or startup time matters
tradeoffs: Can require base image and workflow changes
usageNotes: Use with dependency scanning and least-privilege container defaults

insights.benefitSummary: Reduces rollout risk by improving Kubernetes config review, debugging, and operational safety.
whenToUse: When manifests or Helm charts change
When incidents involve rollout or networking issues
tradeoffs: Cluster behavior can vary by environment
usageNotes: Pair with policy checks and progressive delivery where possible

insights.benefitSummary: Adds safer infrastructure changes with plan review, policy checks, and drift-aware workflows.
tradeoffs: More checks can slow urgent changes
usageNotes: Use with separate plan/apply stages and reviewed state backends

insights.benefitSummary: Speeds AWS delivery and troubleshooting across IAM, networking, compute, and serverless workflows.
whenToUse: When debugging permissions, scaling, or runtime issues
tradeoffs: AWS service sprawl can increase context load
usageNotes: Keep environment-specific settings explicit and review IAM changes carefully

insights.benefitSummary: Improves database reliability through better query analysis, migration review, and indexing decisions.
whenToUse: When latency or lock contention rises
tradeoffs: Indexing choices can increase write cost
usageNotes: Validate with explain plans and staged migration rollouts

insights.benefitSummary: Shortens time-to-understanding during incidents by correlating logs, metrics, traces, and timelines.
tradeoffs: Signal quality depends on telemetry coverage
Too many dashboards can slow triage
usageNotes: Prefer a small set of trusted dashboards and preserve incident notes as you investigate

insights.benefitSummary: Safe local file operations for analysis, diffing, and controlled write workflows.
whenToUse: When tool needs workspace file access
tradeoffs: Write access can be dangerous without guardrails
usageNotes: Prefer read-first policies in sensitive repos

insights.benefitSummary: Detects insecure workflow patterns and permission issues before they reach production.
usageNotes: Pair with CodeQL + dependency review checks

insights.benefitSummary: Adds actionable dependency risk context and upgrade paths for faster remediation.
usageNotes: Use with allowlist policy and risk tiers

insights.benefitSummary: Enforces repeatable policy decisions across CI/CD and repo configuration.
tradeoffs: Overly strict policies can reduce velocity
usageNotes: Start with visibility mode then enforce

insights.benefitSummary: Prevents weak releases by validating versioning, gates, and readiness evidence.
usageNotes: Integrate with changelog + semver automation

insights.benefitSummary: Tracks quality/security trends so regressions are visible early.
usageNotes: Focus on a small set of KPIs first

insights.benefitSummary: Enables browser automation workflows for dynamic UIs and end-to-end checks.
whenToUse: When APIs are insufficient for validation
tradeoffs: Higher security exposure via remote control
usageNotes: Currently high-risk in this policy setup; requires explicit override

insights.benefitSummary: Brings first-party GitHub repository, issue, and PR workflows directly into agent tooling.
tradeoffs: Can create noisy automation if overused
usageNotes: Prefer least-privilege GitHub auth and explicit write approvals

insights.benefitSummary: Makes dashboards, metrics, and incident context queryable from the same workflow as code changes.
whenToUse: When validating production impact of a change
tradeoffs: Signal quality depends on dashboard hygiene
Access control must match production sensitivity
usageNotes: Use with a small set of trusted dashboards and alert entry points

insights.benefitSummary: Adds reliable cloud browser automation for login-heavy or dynamic product flows.
tradeoffs: Browser automation is slower and costlier than API checks
usageNotes: Use for high-value user flows, not every validation path

insights.benefitSummary: Connects code changes to Cloudflare deployment, routing, storage, and edge configuration workflows.
whenToUse: When rolling out infra or platform changes
tradeoffs: Environment drift can hide configuration mistakes
Write access should be tightly scoped
usageNotes: Pair with explicit environment targeting and change review

insights.benefitSummary: Supplies up-to-date technical documentation context without depending on stale model memory.
whenToUse: When docs accuracy matters more than speed
usageNotes: Prefer it for framework and SDK questions before relying on memory

insights.benefitSummary: Speeds internal operations by letting teams query docs/tasks from Claude.
usageNotes: Scope permissions to least privilege

insights.benefitSummary: Improves PR security review quality with threat-oriented feedback loops.
usageNotes: Use with blocked-tier policy for merge gates

insights.benefitSummary: Cuts incident response time by turning fragmented logs into coherent timelines.
tradeoffs: Quality depends on input signal quality
usageNotes: Keep manual validation loop before final report

insights.benefitSummary: Automates evidence collection for audits and recurring compliance checks.
usageNotes: Store outputs in immutable audit artifacts

insights.benefitSummary: Lets Claude Code reach containerized MCP servers through Docker's gateway tooling instead of bespoke local setup.
whenToUse: When local MCP setup is fragmented
When you want repeatable dev environments
tradeoffs: Adds Docker Desktop as a dependency
Container mediation can hide low-level issues
usageNotes: Best fit when your team already uses Docker as the local platform standard

insights.benefitSummary: Gives Claude Code high-fidelity browser debugging for performance, DOM, and runtime inspection tasks.
whenToUse: When browser issues are hard to reproduce from logs alone
When inspecting live UI state matters
tradeoffs: Can be slower than unit-level validation
Needs care around pages with sensitive content
usageNotes: Use it selectively for interactive debugging and regression validation

insights.benefitSummary: Connects app development workflows to a widely used backend platform for faster iteration on auth, data, and hosting.
whenToUse: When your stack depends on Firebase services
tradeoffs: Tight platform coupling can reduce portability
usageNotes: Keep project and environment targeting explicit to avoid accidental production changes

insights.benefitSummary: Brings dependency and code-scan findings directly into developer workflows.
tradeoffs: Findings volume may overwhelm teams at first
usageNotes: Use with severity thresholds in CI

insights.benefitSummary: Hardens GitHub Actions quickly with actionable permission and supply-chain checks.
usageNotes: Pair with branch protection required checks

insights.benefitSummary: Turns SBOM/security data into prioritized fix plans for maintainers.
usageNotes: Cross-check with Dependabot and audit outputs

insights.benefitSummary: Ensures release quality by enforcing agreed policy gates in one flow.
usageNotes: Define emergency override process upfront

insights.benefitSummary: Systematizes GitHub maintenance workflows across issues, PRs, contributor activity, and release hygiene.
whenToUse: When project maintenance starts consuming too much ad hoc time
Before release or backlog cleanup cycles
tradeoffs: Can formalize workflows that were previously lightweight
Still needs human judgment on community interactions
usageNotes: Use it with a clear triage policy and issue/PR labeling scheme

insights.benefitSummary: Improves complex task execution by structuring decomposition, delegation, and multi-step coordination.
whenToUse: When a task spans multiple domains
When one pass of a single agent is insufficient
tradeoffs: Coordination overhead can outweigh benefits on simple tasks
usageNotes: Use for genuinely multi-step work, not routine single-file edits

insights.benefitSummary: Bundles practical software delivery skills like planning, test fixing, and code review execution into one reusable workflow layer.
whenToUse: When work repeatedly follows the same engineering loop
tradeoffs: Broad workflow bundles can be less opinionated than specialized skills
May overlap with local team conventions
usageNotes: Use as a default engineering baseline, then layer narrower skills as needed

insights.benefitSummary: Specializes database development around Neon, Postgres, auth, and modern serverless data workflows.
bestFor: Teams using Drizzle or modern TS backends
whenToUse: When schema, auth, or query workflows are tied to Neon
When app and database changes move together
tradeoffs: Less useful outside the Neon ecosystem
usageNotes: Best fit when Neon is an explicit platform dependency, not a hypothetical future option
